privacy.1text: At Nexus Nine, we respect our users' privacy...
privacy.2text: We may collect the following data when you use Nexus Nine:
privacy.214: Avatar or profile picture (if provided by the user)
privacy.22: Information generated by the use of the service
privacy.221: Game statistics (games played, wins, losses, scores)
privacy.3text: The collected information is used solely to:
privacy.34: Improve stability, security, and user experience
privacy.3text2: We do not use the data for commercial or advertising purposes.
privacy.41: Passwords are stored encrypted and never in plain text
privacy.42: Data is stored in a protected database
privacy.43: Reasonable technical measures are applied to prevent unauthorized access
privacy.4text: However, no system is 100% secure and absolute security cannot be guaranteed.
privacy.5text: Nexus Nine does not sell, rent, or share personal data with third parties.
privacy.5text2: Data may only be accessed by the project developers for technical or academic purposes.
privacy.6text: As a user, you have the right to:
privacy.63: Request deletion of your account and associated data
privacy.6text2: To exercise these rights, you can delete your account from the application (if available) or contact the project developers.
privacy.7text: Nexus Nine may use cookies or browser local storage to:
privacy.7text2: No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.8text: This Privacy Policy may be updated as the project evolves.
privacy.8text2: Changes will be published on this same page.
privacy.9text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact the development team through the project repository.

terms.1text1: By accessing and using Nexus Nine, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.1text2: If you do not agree with them, you must stop using the application.
terms.2text1: Nexus Nine is an online card game, inspired by Triple Triad...
terms.2text2: The service is provided for educational purposes and without commercial guarantees.
terms.31: The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials
terms.33: Each user is responsible for the activity carried out from their account
terms.4text1: When using Nexus Nine, the user agrees to:
terms.41: Not use the service for illegal purposes
terms.42: Not attempt to exploit errors, bugs, or vulnerabilities
terms.43: Not interfere with other players' experience
terms.44: Not perform attacks, cheating, or system manipulation
terms.45: Not use inappropriate and/or abusive language
terms.46: Not discriminate based on sex, age, race, religion, or political preference
terms.4text2: Failure to comply with these rules may result in account suspension or deletion.
terms.51: The code, design, and content of Nexus Nine belong to its developers
terms.52: The game is inspired by Triple Triad but is not affiliated with or endorsed by Square Enix
terms.53: All content is used for educational and non-profit purposes
terms.61: The service may not be available at all times
terms.62: It may be interrupted due to maintenance, errors, or modifications
terms.63: Continuous availability or permanent data preservation is not guaranteed
terms.7text1: Nexus Nine is provided “as is”, without warranties of any kind.
terms.7text2: The developers are not responsible for:
terms.73: Damages resulting from the use of the application
terms.8: Modifications to the service or terms
terms.8text1: The developers reserve the right to:
terms.8text2: Modifications will be published on this page.
terms.9text: This project is governed by general principles and is not subject to a specific commercial legal framework, as it is an academic project.
terms.10text: For any questions related to these Terms of Service, you can contact the development team through the project repository.
